comment.text: Add scheduled ingestion of new job postings. Create backend/ingest.ts exporting: (1) an IngestDeps interface with findThreads(): Promise<HiringThread[]>, fetchComments(hnId: string): Promise<RawComment[]>, and store: JobStore, so tests can inject fakes; (2) async function ingestOnce(deps: IngestDeps): Promise<void> that discovers hiring threads, upserts each thread into the store, fetches its comments, parses each comment with parseJob, and upserts the resulting jobs keyed by hnCommentId; re-running it must not duplicate jobs; (3) function startIngestSchedule(deps: IngestDeps, intervalMs: number): () => void that runs ingestOnce immediately, then every intervalMs via setInterval, and returns a stop function that cancels the schedule. Wire the real findHiringThreads/fetchThreadComments as the default deps.
